topic: your security camera flagged motion — you live alone
niche: Don't Blink — terrifying faceless horror Shorts (~30s). AI full-motion clips. Jumpscare in last 3 seconds.
viewer_moment: the second you realize the feed is not lying
hook_angles: Motion alert at 3:12 AM — you live alone.
Your Ring flagged someone inside. You never opened the door.
The camera saw movement. The room was empty when you checked.
script_beats: Speaker tap — false calm glitch excuse
Figure at bed foot staring into lens
visual_framing: Night-vision green CCTV UI, phone app POV, final lens lunge full frame
competitor_gap: Many security-cam Shorts are static found-footage without earned false calm or lens lunge payoff
title_formula: 🔊 Motion alert at 3:12 AM — you live alone
quality_notes: Mute-safe: app UI + night vision reads without audio. Rotate scare type vs mirror upload.
